description: A part that was recently replaced on a truck has failed prematurely. The fleet manager needs to file a warranty claim with the part supplier.

nodes.task_description: Identify the failed part and find the original repair order where it was installed.

expected_outcome.value: The manager finds the record of the initial repair.

nodes.task_description: Check the warranty terms for that part to confirm it is still covered.

expected_outcome.value: The manager confirms the part is under warranty.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a warranty claim with the supplier, providing the original purchase and installation details.

expected_outcome.value: A claim is filed with the supplier.

nodes.task_description: The supplier approves the claim and ships a replacement part at no charge.

expected_outcome.value: The company receives a free replacement part.
